title: [Skyship, Exterior]
description: The metal walkway widens, expanding into an oval-shaped platform extending off of the skyship's dark exterior.  At one side of the oval, close to the half-wall at the ship's edge, a series of steps are raised several feet off the ground and are flanked by unlit metal lanterns extending from tall poles.  Facing these steps, thick, chalked white lines are drawn onto the ground in rows.  Thick cord nets attached to the ship surround the area, fixed to both the half-walls and overhanging, dark metal beams.
